method: Real before/after measurement from the focused debug-localization study on andela/buggy-python (objective counts from the gatekeeper ledger + investigation; no canned/offline judge).

metrics.result: one cycle to the first fix site
both correct; the graph path reached the hub first, before any leaf source was read

interpretation: The target is intentionally small, so the token delta is modest; the stronger benefit is navigation (60% fewer files, one cycle). See docs/metrics/KNOWLEDGE_QUALITY_METRICS.md.
